channel.title: OpenPrinting News
channel.description: Latest news and updates from the OpenPrinting project

item.title: libcups v3.0.2
item.author: Mike
item.description: libcups v3.0.2 is a bug fix release.

item.title: PAPPL 1.4.11
item.author: Mike
item.description: PAPPL v1.4.11 is a bug fix release.

item.title: OpenPrinting News - Opportunity Open Source 4.0 in the IIIT Allahabad
item.author: Till
item.description: Opportunity Open Source 4.0, in the IIIT Allahabad in Prayagraj, Uttar Pradesh, India, on Aug 28-30

item.title: CUPS 2.4.19
item.author: Zdenek
item.description: CUPS 2.4.19 fixes a regression in shared printing from non-local accounts.

item.title: CUPS 2.4.18
item.author: Zdenek
item.description: CUPS 2.4.18 brings hotfix after CVE-2026-27447

item.title: CUPS 2.4.17
item.author: Zdenek
item.description: CUPS 2.4.17 release includes fixes for 8 vulnerabilities

item.title: libcups v3.0.1
item.author: Mike
item.description: libcups v3.0.1 is a bug fix release.

item.title: OpenPrinting News - Opportunity Open Source 4.0 - Call for Locations
item.author: Till
item.description: Where will the 4th edition take place? Please send us your proposal!

item.title: libcups v3.0.0
item.author: Mike
item.description: libcups v3.0.0 is the first stable release of the CUPS v3 library and tools which remove deprecated APIs, add new APIs, and normalize existing APIs.

item.title: PAPPL 1.4.10
item.author: Mike
item.description: PAPPL v1.4.10 is a bug fix release.

item.title: CUPS 2.4.16
item.author: Zdenek
item.description: CUPS 2.4.16 hot fix release is available

item.title: OpenPrinting News - Tech over Tea #299 - Brodie interviews Till Kamppeter
item.author: Till
item.description: Everything about OpenPrinting, history, what we are doing, funding and the future, ...

item.title: CUPS 2.4.15
item.author: Zdenek
item.description: CUPS 2.4.15 fixes two CVEs in scheduler

item.title: OpenPrinting News - Google Summer of Code 2025 - Our most successful one!
item.author: Till
item.description: That's a wrap! All the 11 contributors have made it!

item.title: OpenPrinting News - Sovereign Tech Agency is investing in OpenPrinting
item.author: Till
item.description: I am covered to work on OpenPrinting full-time until end-2026

item.title: OpenPrinting News - Opportunity Open Source 3.0 in the IIT Kanpur, India
item.author: Till
item.description: For our third edition we returned to Kanpur

item.title: OpenPrinting News - UbuCon Asia 2025 in Kathmandu, Nepal
item.author: Till
item.description: Organized by the Ubuntu and GNOME communities of Nepal

item.title: CUPS 2.4.13
item.author: Zdenek
item.description: CUPS 2.4.13 fixes important and moderate vulnerabilities

item.title: CUPS 2.4.14
item.author: Zdenek
item.description: CUPS 2.4.14 fixes installation of localized files

item.title: OpenPrinting News - Opportunity Open Source 3.0 - Schedules and contributions published
item.author: Till
item.description: Have a look into the amazing presentations and workshops, plan your participation!
